# Swords
# https://revengeofthefallengame.fandom.com/api.php?action=parse&page=Swords&prop=wikitext

The sword is the main weapon of the warrior, the knight and the paladin. It is focused on high dps at low range

<div align="center" style="font-size: 22pt; color: #ababab; width: auto; background-color: #070345; #242424; border-bottom: 20px #121212 solid; border-radius: 20px 20px 0px 0px; padding: 15px;">Speciality</div><div align="center" style="font-size: 22pt; color: #ababab; width: auto; background-color: #070345; #242424; border-bottom: 20px #121212 solid; border-radius: 0px 0px 0px 0px; padding: 15px;">Primal</div><div style="background-color: #828286; border-bottom: 20px #828286 solid; padding: 10px;">
{| align="center" style="width: auto;"
|-  
| {{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = BelsDecapitator.png
| link = Bel's Decapitator
| text = Bel's Decapitator
}}
| {{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = Thusala's Slasher.png
| link = Thusala's Slasher
| text = Thusala's Slasher
}}
|}
</div><div align="center" style="font-size: 22pt; color: #ababab; width: auto; background-color: #070345; #242424; border-bottom: 20px #121212 solid; border-radius: 0px 0px 0px 0px; padding: 15px;">Legendary</div><div style="background-color: #828286; border-bottom: 20px #828286 solid; padding: 10px;">
{| align="center" style="width: auto;"
|-  
| {{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = AncientStoneSword.png
| link = Ancient Stone Sword
| text = Ancient Stone Sword
}}
| {{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = SwordOfTheColossus.png
| link = Sword of the Colossus
| text = Sword of the Colossus
}}
| {{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = ShatteredWarAxe.png
| link = Shattered War Axe
| text = Shattered War Axe
}}
| {{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = OmegaAncientSword.png
| link = Omega Ancient Sword
| text = Omega Ancient Sword
}}
| {{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = ThrowingSpear.png
| link = Throwing Spear
| text = Throwing Spear
}}
|-
| {{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = EnchantedUruSword.png
| link = Enchanted Uru Sword
| text = Enchanted Uru Sword
}}
| {{ImageBlack
| file = Gungnir.png
| link = Gungnir
| text = Gungnir
}}
| {{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = WarbringersFlagpole.png
| link = Warbringer's Flagpole
| text = Warbringer's Flagpole
}}
| {{ImageBlack
| file = RottingArm.png
| link = Rotting Arm
| text = Rotting Arm
}}
| {{ImageBlack
| file = SwordOfOryx.png
| link = Sword of Oryx
| text = Sword of Oryx
}}
|}
</div><div align="center" style="font-size: 22pt; color: #ababab; width: auto; background-color: #070345; #242424; border-bottom: 20px #121212 solid; border-radius: 0px 0px 0px 0px; padding: 15px;">Heroic</div><div style="background-color: #828286; border-bottom: 20px #828286 solid; padding: 10px;">
{| align="center" style="width: auto;"
|-  
| {{ImageBlack
| file = CrystalSword.png
| link = Crystal Sword
| text = Crystal Sword
}}
| {{ImageBlack
| file = DemonBlade.png
| link = Demon Blade
| text = Demon Blade
}}
| {{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = DoctorSwordsworth.png
| link = Doctor Swordsworth
| text = Doctor Swordsworth
}}
| {{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = UnstableAnomaly.png
| link = Unstable Anomaly
| text = Unstable Anomaly
}}
| {{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = EnchantedIceBlade.png
| link = Enchanted Ice Blade
| text = Enchanted Ice Blade
}}
| {{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = SwordOfIllumination.png
| link = Sword of Illumination
| text = Sword of Illumination
}}
| {{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = SwordOfTheFallen.png
| link = Sword of the Fallen
| text = Sword of the Fallen
}}
|}
</div><div align="center" style="font-size: 22pt; color: #ababab; width: auto; background-color: #070345; #242424; border-bottom: 20px #121212 solid; border-radius: 0px 0px 0px 0px; padding: 15px;">Artifact</div><div style="background-color: #828286; border-bottom: 20px #828286 solid; padding: 10px;">
{| align="center" style="width: auto;"
|-  
| {{ImageBlackLarge2
| file = PixieEnchantedSword.png
| link = Pixie-Enchanted Sword
| text = Pixie-Enchanted Sword
}}
| {{ImageBlack
| file = Indomptable.png
| link = Indomptable
| text = Indomptable
}}
| {{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = SwordOfTheMadGod.png
| link = Sword of the Mad God
| text = Sword of the Mad God
}}
| {{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = ShadowboneSword.png
| link = Shadowbone Sword
| text = Shadowbone Sword
}}
| {{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = TheSeaweedSword.png
| link = The Seaweed Sword
| text = The Seaweed Sword
}}
|}
</div><div align="center" style="font-size: 22pt; color: #ababab; width: auto; background-color: #070345; #242424; border-bottom: 20px #121212 solid; border-radius: 0px 0px 0px 0px; padding: 15px;">Unique</div><div style="background-color: #828286; border-bottom: 20px #828286 solid; padding: 10px;">
{| align="center" style="width: auto;"
|-  
| {{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = PirateKingsCutlass.png
| link = Pirate King’s Cutlass
| text = Pirate King’s Cutlass
}}
| {{ImageBlack
| file = Vinesword.png
| link = Vinesword
| text = Vinesword
}}
| {{ImageBlack
| file = Frostbite.png
| link = Frostbite
| text = Frostbite
}}
| {{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = SkullSplitterSword.png
| link = Skull-splitter Sword
| text = Skull-splitter Sword
}}
| {{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = SwordOfTheRainbowsEnd.png
| link = Sword of the Rainbow’s End
| text = Sword of the Rainbow’s End
}}
|-
| {{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = ApocalypseFeather.png
| link = Apocalypse Feather
| text = Apocalypse Feather
}}
| {{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = DreadstumpsRapier.png
| link = Dreadstump's Rapier
| text = Dreadstump's Rapier
}}
| {{ImageBlack
| file = FangOfFrost.png
| link = Fang of Frost
| text = Fang of Frost
}}
| {{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = SwordOfTheAquaticGod.png
| link = Sword of the Aquatic God
| text = Sword of the Aquatic God
}}
| {{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = SwordOfTheDemonLord.png
| link = Sword of the Demon Lord
| text = Sword of the Demon Lord
}}
|}
</div><div align="center" style="font-size: 22pt; color: #ababab; width: auto; background-color: #070345; #242424; border-bottom: 20px #121212 solid; border-radius: 0px 0px 0px 0px; padding: 15px;">Galactic</div><div style="background-color: #828286; border-bottom: 20px #828286 solid; padding: 10px;">
{| align="center" style="width: auto;"
|-  
| {{ImageBlack
| file = StardustBlade.png
| link = Stardust Blade
| text = Stardust Blade
}}
|}
</div><div align="center" style="font-size: 22pt; color: #ababab; width: auto; background-color: #070345; #242424; border-bottom: 20px #121212 solid; border-radius: 0px 0px 0px 0px; padding: 15px;">Uncommon</div><div style="background-color: #828286; border-bottom: 20px #828286 solid; padding: 10px;">
{| align="center" style="width: auto;"
|-  
| {{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = SkysplitterSword.png
| link = Skysplitter Sword
| text = Skysplitter Sword
}}
| {{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = SwordOfAcclaim.png
| link = Sword of Acclaim
| text = Sword of Acclaim
}}
| {{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = SwordOfSplendor.png
| link = Sword of Splendor
| text = Sword of Splendor
}}
|}
</div><div align="center" style="font-size: 22pt; color: #ababab; width: auto; background-color: #070345; #242424; border-bottom: 20px #121212 solid; border-radius: 0px 0px 0px 0px; padding: 15px;">Normal</div><div style="background-color: #828286; border-bottom: 20px #828286 solid; padding: 10px;">
{| align="center" style="width: auto;"
|-  
| {{ImageBlack
| file = ShortSword.png
| link = Short Sword
| text = Short Sword
}}
| {{ImageBlack
| file = BroadSword.png
| link = Broad Sword
| text = Broad Sword
}}
| {{ImageBlack
| file = Saber.png
| link = Saber
| text = Saber
}}
| {{ImageBlack
| file = LongSword.png
| link = Long Sword
| text = Long Sword
}}
| {{ImageBlack
| file = Falchion.png
| link = Falchion
| text = Falchion
}}
| {{ImageBlack
| file = FireSword.png
| link = Fire Sword
| text = Fire Sword
}}
|-
| {{ImageBlack
| file = GlassSword.png
| link = Glass Sword
| text = Glass Sword
}}
| {{ImageBlack
| file = GoldenSword.png
| link = Golden Sword
| text = Golden Sword
}}
| {{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = RavenheartSword.png
| link = Ravenheart Sword
| text = Ravenheart Sword
}}
| {{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = DragonsoulSword.png
| link = Dragonsoul Sword
| text = Dragonsoul Sword
}}
| {{ImageBlack
| file = ArchonSword.png
| link = Archon Sword
| text = Archon Sword
}}
| {{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = SwordOfMajesty.png
| link = Sword of Majesty
| text = Sword of Majesty
}}
|}
</div>

<div align="center" style="font-size: 22pt; color: #ababab; width: auto; background-color: #070345; #242424; border-bottom: 20px #121212 solid; border-radius: 0px 0px 20px 20px; padding: 15px;">
